planNote: mode: split (Increment B re-scope). The active scopes array is synchronized to the authoritative single-file eight-scope plan in scopes.md. Increment A is Scopes 1-4, Increment B is Scope 5 brief core plus Scope 6 Feature 002 consume-once and registry discoverability, and Increment C is Scope 7 CMG/JPM overlays plus Scope 8 real-canary/accessibility hardening. The former combined adaptive-brief/Feature 002 group is retained only in supersededFiveScopeMirror and is not executable planning truth.
evidenceBoundary: Planning-owned structured handoff only. Deterministic tests execute production logic over immutable recorded real source inputs; controlled live SEC acquisition is a separate integration category; browser rows use the real ephemeral static server and committed source-qualified publications with no request interception, external browser provider, or self-validating fixture assertion.

tests.description: Production identity/period/reconciliation/integrity/metric/diagnostic/archetype helpers propagate missing/conflicted/restated states only through real dependency edges.
Existing baseline remains intact and the additive Feature 010 contract/period/reconciliation/metric/diagnostic/archetype group executes production functions.
Whole-publication validation of the MSFT canary proves exact retained bytes, statement integrity, restatement/conflict lineage, and summary/detail parity.

testTitles: Regression: SCN-010-004 annual quarterly YTD and instant history preserve exact period meaning
Regression: SCN-010-005 statement imbalance blocks clean dependent conclusions and preserves source facts
Regression: SCN-010-006 amended facts become current while original observations remain auditable
Regression: SCN-010-025 conflicting sources remain visible and never become an average
Regression: SCN-010-026 missing concepts remain unavailable while independent facts stay usable
tests.description: Period, integrity, restatement, conflict, and missing-field behavior on the real route.

testTitles: Regression: SCN-010-010 raw and contextual diagnostics remain side by side with complete trace
Regression: SCN-010-011 omitted preferred stock is absent from source and never zero or pass
Regression: SCN-010-012 buyback interpretation includes issuance dilution and net share change
tests.description: Raw/contextual diagnostics, preferred-stock absence, and buyback interpretation on the real route.

testTitles: Regression: SCN-010-001 Microsoft Simple prioritizes sourced software drivers and preserves separate clocks
Regression: SCN-010-008 archetypes change KPI priority without changing shared financial facts
Regression: SCN-010-009 unclassified companies retain shared facts and inherit no default lens
Regression: SCN-010-027 optional source failure preserves the last valid dossier without credential prompts
tests.description: MSFT Simple prioritization, archetype/KPI priority, unclassified behavior, and optional-failure preservation on the real route.
Complete cumulative Feature 010 browser suite through Scope 1 over the real static server without request interception.
